name: Chicken and Vegetable Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 3 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, diced
1 package (1 lb. 5 oz.) frozen lo mein stir fry meal
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat until hot. Add chicken; cook and stir for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the chicken is no longer pink. Remove from the skillet and cover to keep warm.
2. In the same skillet, combine the frozen vegetables with noodles, pea pods, and the frozen sauce from the packet. Mix well. Cover and cook for 7 to 10 minutes, or until the vegetables are crisp-tender. Return chicken to the skillet; mix well. Cook and stir until thoroughly heated. Sprinkle with peanuts. Makes 4 servings.
